hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: All four signals are flat with negative composite scores and elevated volatility, especially ETH and SOL. Betas above 1 for three of the four assets amplify market swings, and alpha is negative across the board. The quant edge is thin, making the signals fragile for ETH (high beta/vol, weak composite), SOL (high vol and negative alpha despite the highest conviction) and LTC (most negative composite and alpha). A defensive stance is warranted; keep exposure tight and retain liquidity.
